verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I can hear the footsteps of my King I can hear His heartbeat beckoning In my darkness He has set me free And now I hear the Spirit calling me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: He's calling Wake up child It's your time to shine You were born for such a time as this :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can hear a holy rumbling I've begun to preach another King Loosing chains and breaking down the walls I want to hear the Father when He calls

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: He's calling Wake up child It's your time to shine You were born for such a time as this :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: This is the anthem of our generation Here we are God Shake our nation All we need is Your love You captivate me :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: /: I am royalty I have destiny I have been set free I'm gonna shape history :/
